name: HDFC ERGO Comprehensive Plus
description: HDFC ERGO's flagship comprehensive plan. Offers AI-powered selfie-based claim filing for minor accidents, 24/7 support, and a massive cashless garage network.

name: Bajaj Allianz Smart Drive
description: Bajaj Allianz's top-rated plan with the industry's highest CSR. Features Motor On-The-Spot repair service and a wide network of 7,000+ garages.

name: ICICI Lombard Complete Cover
description: ICICI Lombard's premium comprehensive policy. Best-in-class digital experience via the IL TakeCare app with cashless garage locator and real-time claim tracking.

name: Tata AIG Motor Guard
description: Tata AIG's trusted comprehensive plan with telematics-enabled Drive Smart pricing. Excellent brand trust and premium customer service.

name: New India Assurance Comprehensive
description: India's oldest and most widespread insurer. New India Assurance offers government-backed reliability with a presence in every major city and town.

name: Kotak Mahindra Comprehensive
description: Kotak's comprehensive plan with strong customer service and competitive pricing. Ideal for Kotak Bank customers availing bundle discounts.

name: Reliance General Motor Cover
description: Reliance General's budget-friendly comprehensive policy. Best for price-sensitive buyers who want basic complete coverage without heavy add-ons.

name: Navi Comprehensive Digital
description: Navi's 100% digital insurance product. No paperwork, instant policy issuance, and quick digital-first claim processing. Ideal for mobile-first users.

name: Oriental Insurance Comprehensive Package
description: Oriental Insurance's standard comprehensive package. A heritage PSU insurer offering affordable premiums with wide rural reach.

name: United India Comprehensive Plan
description: United India Insurance's comprehensive offering. Government-owned with a long heritage, ideal for PSU employees and government sector customers.

name: HDFC ERGO Third-Party Cover
description: HDFC ERGO's mandatory third-party liability coverage. Legally compliant, covering unlimited TP bodily injury compensation and up to ₹7.5 lakh property damage.

name: Bajaj Allianz Third-Party Insurance
description: Bajaj Allianz's third-party policy. The minimum legally required coverage at IRDAI-mandated premium rates with excellent claim support.

name: ICICI Lombard Third-Party Liability
description: ICICI Lombard's IRDAI-regulated third-party plan. Best for owners of old cars (10+ years) who don't need own-damage coverage due to the car's low market value.

name: New India Assurance Third-Party
description: New India's third-party plan. Government-backed insurer with 3,000+ branches — easy to access for claim filing even in smaller towns.

name: HDFC ERGO Standalone OD Select
description: HDFC ERGO's standalone own-damage plan for car owners who already have a long-term TP policy. Switch OD insurer freely every year for the best rates.

name: Bajaj Allianz Standalone OD Shield
description: Bajaj Allianz's standalone OD plan with their industry-leading 98.53% CSR. Pairs well with any valid TP policy for complete coverage.

name: ICICI Lombard Standalone OD Pro
description: ICICI Lombard's premium standalone OD policy. Offers flexible add-on combinations and the best digital claim interface in the industry.

name: Tata AIG Standalone OD Guard
description: Tata AIG's standalone OD plan. Telematics-ready with Drive Smart scoring — safe drivers get additional discounts at renewal.

name: Navi Standalone OD Digital
description: Navi's budget-friendly standalone OD plan. Fully digital onboarding and claims — no physical inspection required in most cases. Great for savvy young car owners.

name: Kotak Mahindra Standalone OD Flex
description: Kotak's flexible standalone OD plan. Customisable add-on selection and competitive pricing for car owners looking to split their TP and OD coverage.
